# fmc_system_information (Data Source)

Get FMC system information.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fmc_system_information" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `hostname` (String) Hostname.
- `lsp_version` (String) LSP version.
- `model` (String) Model.
- `platform` (String) Platform.
- `serial_number` (String) Serial number.
- `server_version` (String) Server version.
- `sru_version` (String) SRU version.
- `type` (String) Type of the object.
- `uptime` (String) Uptime.
- `vdb_version` (String) VDB version.
